query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(createdAt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as earliest, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(createdAt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as latest, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(createdAt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as earliest, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(createdAt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as latest, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders;
